title: feat: add theming support
body:
## Overview

Allow users to customize the TUI color scheme.

## Expected Behavior

Theme loads from maestro.toml; defaults to dark.

## Files to Modify

- src/tui/theme.rs (new)
- src/config.rs

## Test Hints

Unit-test theme parsing. Snapshot-test rendering.

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
